creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
gaa's website seems to be gone now, and a search on yahoo/altavista/etc.
turns up nothing. could the maintainer of this port account for its
whereabouts/status, etc.? I'm not going to suggest nuking the port
unless it cannot be found. (its description sounds nice :)

Fix: 

Feedback from maintainer needed first.
How-To-Repeat: 
Search around for gaa.
